description: RGB shows a normal-looking arid coastline with standard teal ocean; SWIR reveals a distinct bright cyan anomaly along the nearshore water surface where clean ocean is uniformly dark, consistent with a residual hydrocarbon slick on the water.
labeler_notes: Oil slick signature clearer in SWIR than RGB; extent is moderate, suggesting post-peak residual slick rather than an active large release.

description: RGB shows arid peri-urban terrain with sparse settlement and a small irrigated patch; SWIR confirms dry bare soil (magenta-pink) with healthy irrigated vegetation (yellow-green) and no anomalous signatures.
labeler_notes: Inland tile from the same event window; no oil, fire, flood, or stress signal visible in either band. Routine arid urban-fringe scene.
